programme.title: Freaky Tales
programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: Smoking Tigers
programme.desc: Lonely 16-year-old Korean American Hayoung tries to hide her problematic family and lower-income background from her new wealthy friends.

programme.title: Boys Go to Jupiter
programme.desc: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

programme.title: Angel City
programme.desc: As Natalie Portman, Kara Nortman, and Julie Uhrman begin the process of building Angel City Football Club from the ground up ahead of its first season in the NWSL, they realize bucking the status quo can be a tightrope walk.

programme.title: Angel City
programme.desc: As players and staff deal with the stress of living up to the club's ambitious goals, ACFC kicks off their inaugural NWSL season at home in front of a vibrant, star-studded crowd.

programme.title: Angel City
programme.desc: Tensions mount as ACFC searches for solutions in their roster while fighting for a playoff spot during the final weeks of their inaugural season.

programme.title: Aquaman
programme.desc: Once home to the most advanced civilization on Earth, the city of Atlantis is now an underwater kingdom ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a vast army at his disposal, Orm plans to conquer the remaining oceanic people -- and then the surface world. Standing in his way is Arthur, Orm's half-human, half-Atlantean brother and true heir to the throne. With help from royal counselor Vulko, Arthur must retrieve the legendary Trident of Atlan and embrace his destiny as protector of the deep sea.

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: After failing to defeat Aquaman the first time, Black Manta wields the power of the mythic Black Trident to unleash an ancient and malevolent force. Hoping to end his reign of terror, Aquaman forges an unlikely alliance with his brother, Orm, the former king of Atlantis. Setting aside their differences, they join forces to protect their kingdom and save the world from irreversible destruction.

programme.title: The Batman
programme.desc: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

programme.title: The Land of Sometimes
programme.desc: Twins Alfie and Elise summon a mysterious Wish Collector and get whisked away to a fantastical realm that's filled with magical creatures and surprises at every turn.

programme.title: Greenland
programme.desc: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting leveled, the family experiences the best and worst in humanity. As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

programme.title: Greenland 2: Migration
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

programme.title: The Long Walk
programme.desc: Teens participate in a grueling high-stakes contest where they must continuously walk or be shot by a member of their military escort.

programme.title: Women Is Losers
programme.desc: Celina Guerrero attempts to rise above poverty in the 1960s San Francisco.

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: Torn apart from her sister and her children, Celie faces many hardships in life, including an abusive husband. With support from a sultry singer named Shug Avery, as well as her stand-her-ground stepdaughter, Celie ultimately finds extraordinary strength in the unbreakable bonds of a new kind of sisterhood.

programme.title: Stand Up & Shout: Songs From a Philly High School
programme.desc: Students at Philadelphia's Hill-Freedman World Academy work with local musicians to create an album of powerful, original songs that captures both the challenging times they're living in and the joy that music brings.

programme.title: South to Black Power
programme.desc: Author and columnist Charles M. Blow calls for African Americans to migrate to the South to upend the political power structure and reclaim the land and culture they left behind.

programme.title: Miss You Can Do It
programme.desc: Abbey Curran, the first woman with cerebral palsy to compete in a Miss USA Pageant, creates a pageant specifically for girls with special needs.

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
programme.desc: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Annihilation
programme.desc: Every generation, a portal opens up between the Outerworld and Earth. Emperor Shao Kahn (Brian Thompson), ruler of the mythical Outerworld, pounces the moment the portal reopens and slips through with his mighty warriors, intent on total domination and uniting the two worlds. However, he has only seven days to complete his task. In the meantime, opposition grows and warriors Sonya Blade (Sandra Hess), Jax (Lynn "Red" Williams), Kitana (Talisa Soto) and Liu Kang (Robin Shou) get ready for war.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Battle of the Realms
programme.desc: The heroes must travel to Outworld to defend Earthrealm as Scorpion searches for the ancient Kamidogu before it's used to resurrect the One Being.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Snow Blind
programme.desc: When Kano and Black Dragon mercenaries become determined to take over Earthrealm, undisciplined Kenshi seeks tutelage from retired Kuai Liang to stop Kano from decimating all of Earthrealm.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Cage Match
programme.desc: Action superstar Johnny Cage squares off against a sinister secret society that's plotting a nefarious scheme. However, the brutal fight against the bloodthirsty warriors of the Netherrealm is just the beginning.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: Robert McCall (Denzel Washington), a man of mysterious origin who believes he has put the past behind him, dedicates himself to creating a quiet new life. However, when he meets Teri (Chloë Grace Moretz), a teenager who has been manhandled by violent Russian mobsters, he simply cannot walk away. With his set of formidable skills, McCall comes out of self-imposed retirement and emerges as an avenging angel, ready to take down anyone who brutalizes the helpless.

programme.title: The Equalizer 2
programme.desc: Robert McCall's mysterious past cuts especially close to home when thugs kill Susan Plummer, his best friend and former colleague. Now out for revenge, McCall must take on a crew of highly trained assassins who'll stop at nothing to destroy him.

programme.title: The Equalizer 3
programme.desc: Since giving up his life as a government assassin, Robert McCall finds solace in serving justice on behalf of the oppressed. Now living in Southern Italy, he soon discovers his new friends are under the control of local crime bosses. As events turn deadly, McCall becomes their protector by taking on the mafia.

programme.title: The Spectacular Now
programme.desc: High school senior Sutter Keely is an effortless charmer and self-proclaimed life of the party who unexpectedly falls in love with the nice girl Aimee Fineky. While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days
programme.desc: It's summer, and Greg Heffley (Zachary Gordon) is looking forward to playing video games and spending time with his friends. However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. But Greg's plan backfires, leaving him in the middle of embarrassing mishaps and a camping trip gone wrong.

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul
programme.desc: Young Greg Heffley is looking forward to a long summer of just hanging out, but his mother throws a monkey wrench into his plans when she forces the entire family to take a road trip for a relative's birthday celebration. His eyes soon light up after he realizes that the excursion is his ticket to a gaming convention to meet YouTube sensation Mac Digby. Greg's imagination then kicks into overdrive as he sneakily hatches a scheme to attend the expo and gain some much-deserved fame.

programme.title: Bang My Box: The Robin Byrd Story
programme.desc: Explore the rise of a boundary-pushing, sex-positive, cable-access pioneer who became an accidental AIDS-era lifeline and First Amendment fighter; at 70, with 600 shows behind her, she considers her place in the history she created.

programme.title: How We Get Free

programme.title: Music Box: Yacht Rock: A Dockumentary

programme.title: Life of the Party

Unfortunately, Deanna winds up at the same school as her less-than-thrilled daughter. Plunging headlong into the campus experience, the outspoken new student soon finds her true self while fully embracing all the fun, freedom and frat boys that she can handle.

programme.title: Life of Pi

Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Home improvement programme where contractor Brian McCourt and designer Sarah Keenleyside help to expand living spaces by tapping into people's backyards. Lynna is a single mother with three teenage kids and the time has come for her to have the back garden of her dreams - Brian and Sarah deliver, and then some, with a hangout that is suitable for use nearly all year round, lush new landscaping, and a beautiful greenhouse.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Join Stephen Mulhern as Dori gets her chance to take on the Banker - she may choose to take an offer from the Banker in exchange for what's in her box or hold out until the end and be rewarded.

programme.title: Dress To Impress
programme.desc: Fashion entrepreneur Caz hopes to be impressed by the style choices of three single ladies. Will any of them shine?

programme.title: Olivia & Alex: Parenthood
programme.desc: Love Island’s Olivia & Alex Bowen invite us behind the scenes of family life as they juggle careers and parenting, while struggling to find quality time together as a couple. After early scans raised the excitement of expecting twins, the episode begins with an emotional appearance on Loose Women, where they describe their experience of Vanishing Twin Syndrome. As the birth of their daughter grows closer, Olivia feels the strain of daily life, while Alex’s decision to enter a bodybuilding competition couldn’t come at a busier time. Their 3-year-old son Abel provides endless laughs and challenges, from chaotic early mornings, to heart-melting moments at his swimming lessons. Through all the ups and downs, Olivia and Alex’s playful banter shines, especially when Alex’s carelessness threatens to derail their romantic Paris getaway. Honest, warm and full of heart, this is not just reality TV — it’s a candid, funny and deeply relatable look at love, loss and modern family life.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Amber and Dan are happy and settled in their relationship - all is good apart from the continuing awkwardness with the Sims sisters, so will Dan and Amber be ready to accept when Demi offers an olive branch in the form of a birthday invite, and will Chloe Sims be able to be in the same room with them without things becoming frosty once again? Elsewhere, Gatsby and Dani's relationship is going from strength to strength and Gatsby is finally ready to pop the question and ask Dani to be his girlfriend - this needs to involve a big gesture in true Gatsby style, but will he be able to pull off the surprise of his life and secure himself a girlfriend? Meanwhile, self-confessed agony aunt Saff puts her skills to good use on her own radio show, budding actor Lockie has landed a part in a film and is buzzing to move forward in his acting career, and entrepreneur Chloe Brockett is ready to take the fashion world by storm... but will Amy Childs give her seal of approval to her new brand?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. Lisa tries to repair relationships while Bronwyn defends herself against mounting accusations, and the group's loyalties become even more divided ahead of their trip.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County
programme.desc: Reality show following the lavish lifestyles of five 'housewives' and their families. Heather finds herself negotiating a birthday conundrum as two of her guests refuse to be in the same room, Jenn and Katie support their children as they move in and out, Shannon introduces her dating 'bench' to Emily and Gina, and Katie's apology attempt to Shannon is met with an explosive reaction.

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: Kia from Crewe is going to be given five menus, each put together by a potential blind date. The five men behind the menus have all come up with a three course meal but Kia will only be having dinner with three of them. She will choose her dates based on the menus she most likes the look of. But when the dinners have been eaten and the dates are done, who will she want to see for seconds?

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revamp of the iconic game show where three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles as they compete in the ultimate supermarket challenge to win a 3,000-pound prize - along with the classic Supermarket Sweep quizzes, trolley dashes and pastel jumpers, the revamped show features exciting new games, challenges and some famous faces.

programme.title: The Floor US
programme.desc: Rob Lowe hosts the American version of the game show. Contestants test their knowledge of anatomy, baby products, songs, water brands and more.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: It's been five months since lovebirds Gatsby and Dani started seeing each other, and now it's time to make things official - their relationship is flying high, quite literally, as it's time for Gatsby to pop the question, but will some on-ground turbulence by way of Chloe Brockett bring their relationship down to the ground with a bump? Meanwhile, Demi is a hopeless romantic and loves being in love - having just celebrated her 25th birthday, she is however still confused when it comes to her sexuality. After cooling things off with Diags and Roman, it's time for some soul-searching with the help of Demi's sisters - will it make her feelings clearer, or will she realise that there aren't any hard or fast rules when it comes to sexuality? Elsewhere, Dan and Amber have entered a new phase of their relationship and have a new addition to the family... baby Oliver the cockapoo! Are Essex's glamorous power couple ready for poochy parenthood, or will harsh realities soon be realised?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. Mary and Angie have an emotional conversation that repairs their friendship, Lisa and John confront communication issues in their marriage, and tensions continue building before Heather's yacht getaway.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County
programme.desc: Reality show following the lavish lifestyles of five 'housewives' and their families. Heather's birthday party wraps up just as Tamra arrives and her plus-one catches Gretchen and Slade off-guard, and Katie finds herself at the centre of rumours regarding her connections with bloggers - elsewhere, Heather enlists the help of Josh Altman and Josh Flagg with the sale of her Beverly Hills home, and Tamra and Jenn have a one-on-one that takes a turn for the worse.

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Gyles Brandreth, Cliff Parisi, and Perri Shakes-Drayton all trying to 'say what they see' as they guess well-known phrases for the chance to win a 50,000-pound jackpot for their chosen charity.

programme.title: The Floor US
programme.desc: Rob Lowe hosts the American version of the game show. Contestants test their knowledge of languages, eras, Marvel, classic cars and more.

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? Do you think you might be in the top 50 per cent of the country, the top ten per cent, or even the top one per cent? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack hosts this quiz show where 100 contestants begin every episode, but who will make it to the end and answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right... and win up to 100,000 pounds?

programme.title: New: Love Island
programme.desc: Reality show. Glamorous singles live in a beautiful villa under the watchful gaze of an audience at home who have the power to decide who goes and who will win a huge cash prize. [S] S13 Ep52

programme.title: New: Love Island: The Debrief
programme.desc: Your daily drop of hot Love Island tea, and all the Villa gossip. With Shakira Khan, Toni Laites and Yasmin Pettet, nothing is off-topic or out of the question. [S] S1 Ep38

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy about US family life. Lois discovers that Chris has been given bad information about sex, so she volunteers to teach a sex education class at the high school. However, her brutal honesty upsets some of the other parents and they have her replaced with a conservative Christian. Stewie sets traps for the tooth fairy.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy series about American family life. Stewie becomes obsessed with Lois after she saves Rupert, though Lois does not take to the new Stewie too well. Peter thinks his doctor is molesting him when he undergoes a prostate examination.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Worried that he's not smart enough for Hayley, Jeff undergoes an experimental intelligence enhancement procedure at the CIA. Elsewhere, Roger recruits Steve to help him harvest snake venom.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about Stan Smith, a hapless CIA man who is constantly on the alert for terrorist activity. Stan discovers his inner child and winds up in a minimum-security prison, leaving Steve to assume a role as the man of the house.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. When Louise and Linda learn of the Jade Jellyfish, a lost treasure hidden somewhere in Wonder Wharf by legendary smuggler Slippery Sam 100 years ago, Louise notices that certain clues refer to the secret Fischoeder clubhouse under the wharf that only the Belchers know about and convinces Linda to help her find it - meanwhile, Bob, Gene, Teddy, and Tina are asked to judge a street performer competition.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. A documentary about Louise's superhuman archery skills is interrupted when an off-looking Teddy starts banging on the front door while moaning incomprehensibly - when he attacks Mort, the Belchers realise that he has become a zombie. As more zombified neighbours appear and try to get in, the Belchers, Rudy, Ollie and Andy barricade themselves in and try to discover any weakness that the zombies might have.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: The first episode of a comedy series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of the lives of working-class teenagers from Liverpool while tackling issues with a refreshing humour. Recently-orphaned Southerner Christopher goes to live with his nan on a council estate in Liverpool - there he forms an unlikely unholy alliance with working-class Reece. On the verge of being expelled, Reece convinces his school's headmaster to give him one last chance and allow him to mentor Christopher to prove that he can positively contribute to the school - despite their differences, a friendship develops between the pair until Christopher throws Reece under the bus in order to impress a girl. An angry Reece can't resist getting his revenge on Christopher, but will this ruin his chances of remaining at the school? Meanwhile, Aimee reluctantly gives her boyfriend Lewis a gift to help with his sexual needs, but she soon learns that he has been cheating on her and seeks revenge...

programme.title: Piglets
programme.desc: Sitcom set in a charmingly dysfunctional police training college. B Group learn how to engage with the public as Bob reveals the ruthless dictator within his mild-mannered exterior, Melanie goes for a full glow-up for Daz's benefit, and Julie tries to join forces with Bob to bring down Cunningham - however, it looks like they may have a corpse on their hands... Meanwhile, Danni receives bombshell news that the wedding band can't make the gig - so Connor kindly offers to step in - and the newly-glamorous Melanie has created a cake to impress Daz that would be too X-rated to appear on Bake Off. Elsewhere, Bob thinks one of the recruits may be his biological child and sets about testing his theory, Afia reassesses her approach to Jasim and seeks advice from Geeta, and Paul gets some crucial intel from Aunty Nooch - when he passes it on to Julie, she decides that he must find a way to take part in a dangerous criminal mission and he pleads with his brother for permission to be involved.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Join Stephen Mulhern as James steps up to play his game - as he opens more of the iconic red boxes, he may be tempted to take an offer from the Banker or find that his biggest reward comes from holding out and taking home what was inside his randomly-selected box all along.

programme.title: Dress To Impress
programme.desc: Rinat, George and Ernest battle to win the affections of Annabelle from Leeds. Will any of the lad wow her with their fashion choices?

programme.title: Olivia & Alex: Parenthood
programme.desc: Olivia and Alex Bowen are back with more family chaos and their trademark mix of love, laughter and parenthood challenges - from chaotic doula sessions to DIY disagreements and birth plan bickering, the couple prove that they really know how to argue and how to make up. Amidst Olivia's dramatic spirals and Alex's earnest attempts to 'just make a list' that turn everyday stresses into comedy gold, Alex bonds with Olivia's dad over golf away from home while Olivia discusses Alex with his mum Louise and then heads out to enjoy some girl talk with Love Island bestie Tina Stinnes - as the couple prepare their home for their new baby girl, Alex and Olivia's humour shines through and shows that the beauty of parenthood is in its chaos.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: It's been five months since lovebirds Gatsby and Dani started seeing each other, and now it's time to make things official - their relationship is flying high, quite literally, as it's time for Gatsby to pop the question, but will some on-ground turbulence by way of Chloe Brockett bring their relationship down to the ground with a bump? Meanwhile, Demi is a hopeless romantic and loves being in love - having just celebrated her 25th birthday, she is however still confused when it comes to her sexuality. After cooling things off with Diags and Roman, it's time for some soul-searching with the help of Demi's sisters - will it make her feelings clearer, or will she realise that there aren't any hard or fast rules when it comes to sexuality? Elsewhere, Dan and Amber have entered a new phase of their relationship and have a new addition to the family... baby Oliver the cockapoo! Are Essex's glamorous power couple ready for poochy parenthood, or will harsh realities soon be realised?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. Mary and Angie have an emotional conversation that repairs their friendship, Lisa and John confront communication issues in their marriage, and tensions continue building before Heather's yacht getaway.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County
programme.desc: Reality show following the lavish lifestyles of five 'housewives' and their families. programme.title: Dinner Date

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Faith Alexander arrives in Midsomer Deverell to meet her long-lost uncle Rex Masters, but Rex has told everyone that Faith's entire family was wiped out in a plane crash and he has disappeared - thanks to Miles King, an old friend who does Rex's gardening, news spreads quickly as Rex's cook Eileen Carnack, cleaner Janet Bailey, and Janet's fiance Jeremy Thacker rush to his home at Stonecroft House. Faith is anxious and can't understand how Rex has photographs of her when they haven't met following a 40-year family feud - after Barnaby asks Jones to investigate the disappearance, Rex's body is found in a river below Crofter's Weir. As Barnaby returns to Rex's study and finds some important clues in a set of risque photographs from the 1960s, can he get to the bottom of the tangled relationships stretching across the generations, learn the truth about Rex's life of mischief-making, and identify the killer?

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Drama series adapted from the novels by James Runcie about a Cambridgeshire village where Sidney Chambers is the local vicar. Sidney takes Geordie on a night out to Johnny Johnson's London jazz club - when Amanda turns up unexpectedly, Sidney and Amanda settle into a night of dancing, but their reverie is interrupted by a scream from backstage. Johnny's sister Claudette has been murdered, leaving everyone close to her devastated. As all the leads seem to come back to the violent past of Claudette's father Archie, recriminations within the family begin to play out. Meanwhile, when Sidney's feelings for Amanda are exposed, the fallout leads the vicar to make a terrible decision that he instantly regrets.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Six-part drama series set in 1953 and adapted from the novels by James Runcie about the town where Sidney Chambers is the local vicar. Tragedy strikes as a policeman is killed and Geordie is shot and badly wounded; believing that the police are on the wrong track, Sidney starts his own investigation. It soon becomes clear that the killer's motives stretch back many years to events that took place during the Second World War. As Sidney wrestles with his own demons about the war, everything seems to be hurtling out of control for the young vicar. With no Amanda to turn to - and with his guilt over Hildegard running rampant - will he be able to keep his head for long enough to track down the killer, and will Sidney be able to admit his true feelings to Amanda before her wedding to Guy?

Harding Redmond is the source of the accusation, a man horrified at the claims made in the diary of his teenage daughter Abigail, who has now gone missing along with the diary. After being grilled by Chief Inspector Benson, Sidney sets out to prove his innocence, but not before the archdeacon sends his old friend Reverend Sam Milburn over from the neighbouring parish to check up on him...

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Drama series set in the 1950s and adapted from the novels by James Runcie. A Cambridge lecturer's fatal fall from the college spires draws Sidney and Geordie into a world of espionage and cover ups where nothing and no-one is what they seem. Geordie calls on Sidney for help following the apparent suicide of Valentine Lyall at Sidney's old college; meanwhile, Lyall's wife Mya is consoled by Valentine's star pupil Kit Bartlett, who used to partake in daredevil climbs of the college buildings alongside his mentor. programme.desc: Domestic sitcom spin-off from the hit '70s show Man About the House. Mildred wants her dog to have all the things she never had, and this includes the joys of motherhood - even George is keen when he learns that there could be money in it...

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The police discover how Shane died, and Marlon presents his wife with an eternity ring on her birthday. Val decides to hold a toga party at the Woolpack to see in the New Year.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Donna worries Ross may be a suspect for Shane's murder, and a stunned Marlon finds out about the couple's affair. Val feels uncomfortable about Daz and Victoria's closeness.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maria asks Tom to help her get the truth about Liam's death. Janice starts her community service. The Platts are horrified to learn the identity of their new neighbours.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maria questions Dev about the night of Liam's death, and Gail attempts to make peace with the Platts' new neighbours, while Tyrone takes steps to allay Molly's suspicions.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: When a man's body is found in Denton Canal, the ageing detective unravels the mystery of a missing dance partner and a web of intrigue involving blackmail, envy and murder.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Dr Summerbee finds herself at the centre of controversy in Aidensfield, Craddock awaits a visit from Her Majesty's Inspector, and Vernon thinks that David may have found romance.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Dr Summerbee takes the blame when disapproving parents lead a pair of young lovers to rebel.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The worlds of miniature dollhouses and real houses collide when prolific real estate agent Alexander Beauvoisin is murdered in front of a crowd at the unveiling of a new dollhouse collection at Midsomer Museum.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon tells the police that Shane was blackmailing Ross about his affair with Donna, while Val warns Daz that she is keeping a close eye on his friendship with Victoria.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Ross returns to the village and attacks Marlon when he realises he implicated him in Shane's murder. Jimmy struggles to cope with the pressure of organising Matthew's funeral.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maria quizzes customers at the salon to see whether they think Tony is capable of murder, and Norris struggles to get rid of Jed, while Molly grows suspicious of Tyrone.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tyrone tells Molly the truth. Audrey decides Maria needs medical help, and Eileen eagerly awaits the arrival of her dad. Meanwhile, Michelle makes Becky feel guilty.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. An old acquaintance of Craddock's arrives unexpectedly and informs him of a top-secret surveillance operation taking place in the area, but the acquaintance may need some help with it.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Mysterious goings-on at Ashfordly Hall look set to take an ominous turn with the arrival of an African chieftain. Meanwhile, Vernon - who is never one to miss a business opportunity - is eager to gain a royal seal of approval.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series set in Cornwall. Martin and Louisa are looking for a nursery for James Henry with Janice gone, Mrs Tishell is shocked to learn that Al has very high blood pressure, and Ruth is approached about selling her farm - elsewhere, Louisa helps with the diagnosis of a pupil which spurs her on to explore a possible career change, but this is not welcome news for Martin as he dislikes change of any kind... even if it could be for the better.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series set in Cornwall. Martin is put out when he hears a voicemail left for Louisa inviting her to interview for a place on a child and adolescent counselling course, and Clive takes up race walking in a bid to get fitter for Sal - however, disaster strikes when he takes a turn for the worse. Meanwhile, Bert decides to quit the whisky business - and leaves Al in the lurch - after Ruth confirms that she is selling the farm.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Drama series set in the 1950s and adapted from the novels by James Runcie. When Theo Graham confesses to Sidney and Geordie that he attacked and killed his landlord Eric Whittaker, they rush to the boarding house and find the alleged victim alive and well, along with his teenage daughter Joan and her stepmother Vivian. Back at the station - despite his protestations that Eric will come after him - Geordie sends the young man on his way. Just hours later, Eric is killed in a hit and run as Sidney and Geordie look on. Meanwhile, Sidney is drawn deeper into the twisted emotional world of the boarding house. Who is Vivian trying to protect?

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Drama series set in the 1950s and adapted from the novels by James Runcie. As the trial of local teen Gary Bell approaches, Sidney and Geordie find themselves at loggerheads regarding his guilt. Meanwhile, Sidney is asked by Reggie Lawson to perform an exorcism at his home and stable yards as he is convinced that the spirit of his dead wife Anna haunts the place. Believing this to be a husband's desperate grief, Sidney hopes his words have given Reggie some solace. That night, Geordie summons Sidney back - Reggie has hanged himself in the same spot as Anna. Investigating Reggie's death at least gives Sidney and Geordie a shared goal again, but why would Reggie take his life when his finest horse is set to triumph at its next race?

programme.title: Trial and Retribution
programme.desc: Blue Eiderdown - Part One: First of a two-part drama. A young prostitute plunges to her death from a block of luxury flats - had she discovered the identity of her mother's killer? [S]

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Drama series about the shady dealings of a loveable rogue and his reluctant sidekick. Terry turns his hand to selling antiques when Arthur's friend Alex is hospitalised.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. The bigger they are, the harder they fall - a battle of giant wheels sees Starchild meet Huge, sixth series world champion Tantrum faces Whiplash, Minotaur seeks revenge against Witch Doctor, and the BattleBots VII World Championship Round of 32 bracket is finally revealed.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. When Thomas decides to teach a university course on the finer points of being a private investigator, he helps his class delve into a real-life mystery involving a student's boyfriend who proves to be in big trouble.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas agrees to help a 12-year-old half-Asian street merchant find his American father, who has been missing since the war in Vietnam - however, his efforts put him into conflict with gangsters and corrupt politicians.

programme.title: Dempsey & Makepeace
programme.desc: Another adventure with the New York police officer and the English policewoman. When Makepeace is badly injured while attempting to arrest a robber, Dempsey finds himself in an awkward situation with his partner - however, Makepeace's unselfish bravery during a terrifying bank siege makes Dempsey think again.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Laura and Rocky are given the task of tailing a man who has recently been released from prison, and the owner of a motorbike shop enlists Ken's help to recover a bike that was sold to a customer who provided a fake name and bank details.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Fantasy espionage series. The Champions come to the aid of a group of brilliant scientists who have been duped into working on a nuclear fission gun.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. Black Dragon is one fight away from a BattleBots record - the most battles fought without being knocked out - when they face Riptide, who have destroyed every opponent in less than a minute, in a shocking Main Event.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Straight-talking St Louis private eye Luther Gillis returns to Hawaii, where he sets about investigating a case on behalf of Higgins when Higgins is being menaced by blackmailers.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. A friend of Robin's - who is also an aspiring writer - comes to stay in the guest house to concentrate on her new novel, which features a cast of characters resembling Thomas and his associates.

programme.title: Dempsey & Makepeace
programme.desc: Another adventure with the New York police officer and the English policewoman. Extortion and blackmail result in a man being viciously murdered and an old friend of Makepeace's being badly injured - elsewhere, Makepeace takes Dempsey home for the night.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Wedding bells are ringing, but the nearest Ken and Harry get to the festivities is installing security cameras for the big day.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Fantasy espionage series. Craig must pose as a criminal after a break-in to find some microfilm.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Drama series about the shady dealings of a loveable rogue and his reluctant sidekick. When Maurice organises a gambling school of six customers who are being threatened by a casino - in spite of having promised his wife that he wouldn't gamble any more - Terry and Arthur have to look after them until Maurice has made his profit.

programme.title: Aussie Pickers
programme.desc: Australian spin-off from the popular US documentary series that follows a group of salvage experts scouring Down Under for forgotten relics in attics, backyards and sheds. Lucas Callaghan and Adam McDonald meet a passionate car collector and a couple who have been collecting together since their honeymoon.

programme.title: Goodwood Festival of Speed
programme.desc: Highlights of the Goodwood Festival of Speed featuring Lando Norris, Kimi Antonelli, Damon Hill, Valentino Rossi and Gerhard Berger, plus the Hill Climb shoot-out and celebrations of 100 years of Ducati.

programme.title: Coogan's Bluff
programme.desc: Action comedy. Arizona Deputy Sheriff Coogan is sent to New York City to collect James Ringerman, a prisoner who has escaped from custody in Arizona - while Coogan is annoyed when everyone in New York City assumes that he is from Texas, his problems are made worse by news that the prisoner is in Bellevue after taking a trip on drugs while in custody. When Coogan decides to cut a few corners and the prisoner escapes in the process, Coogan is ordered home but refuses to do so without his man...

programme.desc: Legendary British actor Jenny Agutter guest stars in this episode of the classic US action drama series. Thomas falls for an attractive security expert hired to help protect Robin's Nest during a jewellery exhibit worth millions of dollars, but she turns out to be the daughter of a notorious crook.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Agatha hires Thomas to find out who took a 10,000 dollar investment from her ladies' club - meanwhile, Higgins is delighted at being asked to teach his distant cousin Sally how to be refined... that is, until he discovers that she is a leather-clad punk rocker.

programme.title: Dempsey & Makepeace
programme.desc: Another adventure with the New York police officer and the English policewoman. The duo probe the connections between a murdered antiques dealer and an Arab embassy official with diplomatic immunity when some priceless ancient Egyptian antiquities are stolen.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Rocky is in love again - this time with a female snooker player - and someone tries to undermine Ken when he has a contract to guard a building site but nothing goes according to plan.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Fantasy espionage series. British Intelligence calls on Nemesis to help test an intricate security system used to guard the top-secret F File.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Drama series about the shady dealings of a loveable rogue and his reluctant sidekick. Terry has to mind a champion boxer who is making a comeback after two years away from the ring, but the crooked promoter has plans to fix the fight.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme fishing series. In the heart of central America - a land known for its remote jungle waterways - lurks a creature believed to reach eight feet in length and weigh up to 300 pounds. It instils fear in all who encounter it as it's known to leap into fishermen's boats and cause fatal injuries - Jeremy Wade is taken to breaking point as he relearns everything he knows about fishing in an attempt to catch this illusive and deadly river monster.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme fishing series. A vast and brooding lake that hides a dark history lies on the Canada-US border - it's an ancient and sacred site for Native Americans, but something has recently risen up from the depths to attack swimmers and stories abound of an invasion of primordial bloodsuckers. In a journey that takes him to the heart of a thundering waterfall in the Pacific Northwest, extreme angler Jeremy Wade embarks on a punishing mission to catch the most ancient river monster of his career.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Sean Bean stars in the very first of the dramas set during the Napoleonic Wars of 19th-century Spain and based on Bernard Cornwell's best-selling novels. After saving the life of Sir Arthur Wellesley, Sergeant Richard Sharpe is rewarded with the field commission of lieutenant - his first mission is to go behind enemy lines to Casa Antiga to locate missing agent James Rothschild, who carries a banker's draft for badly-needed funds for the British Army.

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: After weeks of preparation, Henry Cole nervously lines up on the grid for his first motorbike race at Oulton Park - he also joins Britain's top drag bike racers for a race that lasts a mere seven seconds and comes off his bike when trying to master motocross... and this time the injury looks serious.

programme.title: Black Sails
programme.desc: Flint and Silver face judgment before the crew. Vane enjoys his new position on the island, Max confronts Bonny, and Eleanor faces a new threat.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The American version of Gordon Ramsay's culinary boot camp. The milestone 350th episode sees the chefs challenged with putting together some fabulous burgers using an assortment of wild ingredients thrown their way by Gordon - when the chefs start feeling homesick in hell, they must decide if they have what it takes to stick around.
